title: Verify existing implementation of timestamp middleware
description: The timestamp-middleware.ts and timestamp-middleware.test.ts already exist in src/middleware/. All 5 tests pass. Implementation uses Express RequestHandler signature with createTimestampMiddleware factory, adds X-Response-Time header, and uses supertest for verification.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/request-logger.ts - factory pattern for middleware creation with config object
src/middleware/rate-limiter.test.ts - supertest usage with express app for middleware testing
